meaning: adj.充满热情的,深情的,感情上的,高尚的
examples: There is something undeniably soulful about the eerie whine of the highland bagpipes.
It was a soulful time in my life, a period of growth and maturity.
Aston Pearl, a New York concierge firm, is recommending more soulful gifts.
Dried herbs are wonderful in wine, imparting a soulful and complex thread to the fruit.
But with his new album, Lay It Down, Green returns to his most soulful form.
